title: What is Ditto Scan?
content: Ditto Scan is an Android document scanner app that helps you capture or import pages, edit them, organize them into projects, and export polished PDFs.

title: Can I scan documents with my phone camera?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan supports live document capture with the device camera so you can scan paper documents directly inside the app.

title: Can I import document photos from the gallery?
content: Yes. You can import images from the gallery or Android photo picker if you already have document photos saved on your device.

title: Does Ditto Scan support flash while scanning?
content: Yes. The capture flow includes flash control to help when lighting conditions are not ideal.

title: Is there a grid overlay while capturing pages?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan includes an optional camera grid overlay that can help you line up documents more accurately.

title: Can I crop document corners manually?
content: Yes. You can manually adjust document corners to tighten the crop around the page before saving.

title: Can I straighten or deskew scanned pages?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan can deskew pages into a flatter scanned-document view for a cleaner final result.

title: Can I rotate scanned pages?
content: Yes. Pages can be rotated left or right before saving or exporting.

title: What image filters are available?
content: Ditto Scan supports Natural, Enhanced Color, Grayscale, and Black and White filter modes.

title: Can I create multi-page document projects?
content: Yes. You can build a project with multiple scanned or imported pages and export it later as one PDF.

title: Can I add more pages to an existing project later?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan lets you add new pages to an existing document project whenever you need to expand it.

title: Can I replace a page without changing its position?
content: Yes. You can replace an existing page while keeping it in the same position within the document.

title: Can I reorder or delete pages?
content: Yes. Pages can be reordered with drag and drop, and individual pages can also be deleted from a project.

title: Can I preview pages before exporting?
content: Yes. Every page can be opened in a full preview where you can move between pages and review the scan before export.

title: Can I zoom in on a scanned page?
content: Yes. The page preview supports pinch to zoom, pan, and double tap to reset the zoom level.

title: Can I edit the crop again from preview?
content: Yes. The preview screen provides a way to jump back into crop editing for a page.

title: Can I share a single page as an image?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan can share an individual page as a JPEG.

title: Can I export a project as a PDF?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan exports document projects as multi-page PDFs.

title: What PDF page sizes can I choose?
content: You can export using A4, Letter, or the Original image size depending on the document you are creating.

title: What PDF quality options are available?
content: Ditto Scan offers Low, Medium, and High PDF export quality settings.

title: Can I share exported PDFs?
content: Yes. Exported PDFs can be shared using the Android share sheet.

title: Does Ditto Scan keep creating duplicate PDF exports?
content: No. The app keeps one current PDF export per project instead of continuously accumulating old exported copies.

title: Can I search, rename, or delete projects?
content: Yes. You can name, rename, search, open, and delete projects from the project library.

title: What project details can I see in the library?
content: The project list includes thumbnails, page counts, and last updated information to make browsing easier.

title: Can I save default settings for future scans?
content: Yes. You can save a default image filter mode, default PDF page size, and default PDF export quality.

title: Does Ditto Scan preserve image orientation?
content: Yes. The app preserves photo orientation from the original image metadata when loading images.

title: Where are my documents stored?
content: Projects, original photos, processed pages, thumbnails, and exports are stored in app-private local storage on your device.

title: Do I need a cloud account to use Ditto Scan?
content: No. Ditto Scan is designed around local on-device storage and does not require a cloud account for normal scanning workflows.

title: Does Ditto Scan work on tablets?
content: Yes. The app supports responsive layouts for both phones and tablets, including flexible tablet-friendly screens.

title: Is there a free version or demo?
content: Yes. Ditto Scan includes a free demo experience with limits, and the app offers subscription plans for expanded access.
